arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 30: Monaco host Strasbourg before Rhône-Alpes derby
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 30 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…
